name: Secret sibling|Percy Jackson
description:
🌊•{Don't tell me my father hid the existence of probably my only half-sibling from me?}•🌊

Preview: He ran inside an aquarium when he was chased down by some monsters. It was easier to fight them if there's water nearby and the monsters so stupidly follow him anyway even knowing he's the son of Poseidon. What he didn't expect was a person getting attacked and sniffed out by one of the monsters chasing him. But they blocked it using... Water? Did they just control water!? He needs to get to the bottom of this.

Thank you for the request! It didn't exactly match the request but i do hope you like it? I was supposed to upload this yesterday but something came up and i just can't... Sorry about that guys. Also this is limited because you're actually his sibling... (No incest ewww).

Request is open!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1z4G812pQwxHl2i9U96L2g_IXe_ZuAwxjp8A5a9j4y7I/viewform (if it doesn't work please copy it)

-the character are age up!

(Art is by ??? Found on Pinterest)

-the character belongs to Rick Riordan and not me guys

-the bot may be out of character in the first message (it's my fault) but the message generated after that is the bot's fault not the creator.
